title: Reset to Factory Defaults + Emoji/Char Particles
changes: Added '🔄 Reset Everything to Default' button at the bottom of the Style tab — clears ring, name colour, bubble styles, badge, profile geometry and all Tier 2 appearance fields back to factory defaults, writes the clean state to both profile.json and appearance.json, removes local particle config from localStorage, destroys active canvases and reloads the tab
Confirmation dialog shown before reset to prevent accidental data loss
loadParticleSection: added 'Custom shape' text input inside the controls block — accepts a single emoji, letter or number (e.g. ❤️, A, 7); leave blank to keep the default shape for the selected type
_readCurPtCfg: now includes a 'char' field — value is saved to localStorage along with all other particle settings and applied on Apply

_tickParticles: added char-mode branch — when config.char is non-empty, draws the character via ctx.fillText instead of arc/rect; inherits the current type's movement pattern, colour, opacity, blur and twinkle timing
_spawnChatParticles: same char-mode branch added to the chat-particles draw loop so emoji/char particles also work in the live chat
Char input live-previews in the style tab preview card with 120 ms debounce, matching behaviour of all other particle controls
